_comment: Copy to config.json and replace the board tokens with real ones. Find a company's token from its careers URL: boards.greenhouse.io/<TOKEN>, jobs.lever.co/<COMPANY>, jobs.ashbyhq.com/<BOARD>. Seed with health-tech / RCM-adjacent employers (e.g. revenue-cycle vendors, digital-health, payers). Unknown tokens are skipped gracefully and reported on stderr.
